channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Does anyone even use 3-button navigation anymore?
item.description: Android offers a choice between 3-button navigation and gesture navigation. In our latest poll, we want to know which one you prefer.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: 3-button navigation on the Galaxy S26 Plus
media:content.media:text: 3-button navigation on the Galaxy S26 Plus
media:content.media:title: 3-button navigation on the Galaxy S26 Plus

item.title: Your Galaxy S26 has two hidden AI notification features that are genuinely useful
item.description: Galaxy S26 includes AI-powered notification summaries and prioritization features.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Notification summary and prioritize notification feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Notification summary and prioritize notification feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Notification summary and prioritize notification feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: 4 Android phones you should buy instead of the iPhone 17e
item.description: The iPhone 17e adds MagSafe and more to an already great iPhone 16e, but Android phones do a few things better (and cheaper).
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: iPhone 17e colors
media:content.media:text: iPhone 17e colors
media:content.media:title: iPhone 17e colors

item.title: The Galaxy S26 is still missing my favorite Gemini trigger, so I used this Samsung hack to bring it back
item.description: This Samsung hack will help you recover a lost trigger for your favorite AI assistant, but be ready to do a bit of work.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Gemini on the Galaxy S26 Plus
media:content.media:text: Gemini on the Galaxy S26 Plus
media:content.media:title: Gemini on the Galaxy S26 Plus

item.title: Discovering YouTube videos with 'Previews' is a change it wants to see if you like
item.description: Like YouTube's previews? This new test aims to give you some insight into a video's content before you click.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The YouTube app listing on the Google Play Store, running on a Google Pixel 8 Pro
media:content.media:text: The YouTube app listing on the Google Play Store, running on a Google Pixel 8 Pro
media:content.media:title: The YouTube app listing on the Google Play Store, running on a Google Pixel 8 Pro

item.title: If you're looking for the OnePlus Watch 4, this leak says it just passed a crucial hurdle
item.description: We might expect a OnePlus Watch 4 launch soon in 2026, as this rumor claimed it's moving through certification with leaked details.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The OnePlus Watch 3 with its box
media:content.media:text: The OnePlus Watch 3 with its box
media:content.media:title: The OnePlus Watch 3 with its box

item.title: These tools on your Galaxy S26 can help you change your look without digging through your closet
item.description: Features like Circle to Search, Google Try On, and Samsung's upgraded Photo Assist can help you change your look in unique ways.
item.author: christinep2424@gmail.com (Christine Persaud)
item.dc:creator: Christine Persaud

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra with an image of a woman on screen
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra with an image of a woman on screen
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra with an image of a woman on screen

item.title: Ignored no more: Google Messages lets you mention friends to make sure you're heard
item.description: Google Messages rolled out "mentions" to help users pierce the chaos in massive group chats on Android.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Google Messages app on the Pixel 3
media:content.media:text: The Google Messages app on the Pixel 3
media:content.media:title: The Google Messages app on the Pixel 3

item.title: Amazon wants a smartphone do-over: 'Transformer' project to take over
item.description: Wild rumors claimed Amazon is headed back down the smartphone road after the Fire Phone failed over a decade ago.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Amazon logo gray background
media:content.media:text: Amazon logo gray background
media:content.media:title: Amazon logo gray background

item.title: Samsung confirms Galaxy S26 will 'soon' support iPhone AirDrop via Quick Share
item.description: The Galaxy S26 will be able to send and receive files with Apple devices using Quick Share.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra sky blue cameras
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra sky blue cameras
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra sky blue cameras

item.title: This smartwatch completely crushed Samsung and Apple in battery life tests — and it just scored a rare discount at Amazon
item.description: Days before Amazon's Big Spring Sale is set to kick off, the retailer is carving a straight $50 off the OnePlus Watch 3.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: A OnePlus Watch 3 with a blue watchface

item.title: Solid-state cooling tech will transform wearables and XR glasses, and I got an early look
item.description: Active cooling on wearables is about to become a reality thanks to this innovative all-silicon design.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:title: xMEMS XMC-2400 active cooling solution demo

item.title: Nothing’s Carl Pei thinks the app era is ending — here’s what comes next
item.description: Carl Pei says apps are on the way out, with AI agents set to run your phone, cutting clutter and effort.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Nothing Phone 3 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Nothing Phone 3 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Nothing Phone 3 review on Android Central

item.title: The next Android update may finally undo some of Google's worst decisions
item.description: Android Canary 2603 introduces new features aimed at fixing common user frustrations.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The Android 17 logo on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL

media:content.media:title: The Android 17 logo on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL

item.title: I'm just as tired as Pixel users are: always-on display is freezing after March patch
item.description: Pixel users expressed sheer frustrations as the March update locks up their always-on display.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: A Google Pixel 10 Pro XL on a Pixelsnap wireless charger with the screensaver function activated

item.title: Google Messages is getting the one feature I’ve actually wanted for years
item.description: Google Messages now lets you share your live location in chats, making meetups easier.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Messages blue logo
media:content.media:text: Google Messages blue logo
media:content.media:title: Google Messages blue logo

item.title: I used the Xiaomi Pad 8 for a month — these four features make the half-priced iPad Air clone the best mid-range Android tablet
item.description: The Pad 8 has a bigger battery, and it's just better to use than its predecessors. And with Xiaomi rolling out productivity-focused accessories, this is a fabulous alternative to the iPad Air that costs half as much.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Xiaomi Pad 8 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Xiaomi Pad 8 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Xiaomi Pad 8 review on Android Central

item.title: Good news for Samsung fans: One UI 8.5 could land on Galaxy S24 and FE phones soon
item.description: If this happens, FE users are finally getting treated like flagships.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The back of the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra in the Titanium Grey colorway
media:content.media:text: The back of the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra in the Titanium Grey colorway
media:content.media:title: The back of the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra in the Titanium Grey colorway

item.title: Don't trust your Pixel Watch steps after the latest firmware update
item.description: Pixel Watch’s latest update is inflating steps and breaking Fitbit stats, leaving users with unreliable health data.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Google Pixel Watch 3 workout screen
media:content.media:text: The Google Pixel Watch 3 workout screen
media:content.media:title: The Google Pixel Watch 3 workout screen

item.title: This unique tablet combines full Android power with a paper-like display and a pro-grade stylus
item.description: Cheap Android tablets usually pack a solid punch, but only when made by name brands. The Huion Kamvas Slate 11 is a clear exception to this rule.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Huion Kamvas Slate 11
media:content.media:text: Huion Kamvas Slate 11
media:content.media:title: Huion Kamvas Slate 11

item.title: iPhone 17e vs. Samsung Galaxy S25 FE: Simplicity or versatility?
item.description: The iPhone 17e is a basic smartphone focused on optimization and performance, while the higher-priced Galaxy S25 FE is all about versatility.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 FE in hands-on photos.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S25 FE in hands-on photos.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S25 FE in hands-on photos.

item.title: Here's how Google plans to 'balance' a safer Android with side-loading this year
item.description: Google will keep side-loading for Android, but not without an "advanced flow" that will bring "balance" to user safety and the OS' openness.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens
media:content.media:text: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens
media:content.media:title: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens

item.title: Horizon Worlds is officially dead on VR. What happens now for the Meta Quest (and the Metaverse)?
item.description: Meta is evolving once again, this time fully removing Horizon Worlds from the Meta Quest experience. Here's what that means for your everyday VR sessions.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The Meta Horizon app on an Honor Magic V5 smartphone in front of a Meta Quest 3 VR headset
media:content.media:text: The Meta Horizon app on an Honor Magic V5 smartphone in front of a Meta Quest 3 VR headset
media:content.media:title: The Meta Horizon app on an Honor Magic V5 smartphone in front of a Meta Quest 3 VR headset

item.title: I'd still choose this Lenovo Chromebook over the MacBook Neo — especially when it's $100 off at Best Buy
item.description: The Lenovo Chromebook Plus is our top recommended laptop for most people, and it just scored a $100 discount at Best Buy.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)

item.title: One-off, silly questions for Gemini might be easier to make if Google's tests are positive
item.description: Google might change up a convenient Gemini feature that many users probably weren't using enough.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Google Pixel 9a sitting on a fence, showing the Gemini prompt screen.

item.title: Galaxy Z TriFold might be dead, but a successor is already in the works
item.description: Samsung is reportedly working on a successor to the Galaxy Z TriFold alongside a new foldable concept.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: WhatsApp, Garmin? Fenix, Forerunners users, and more can now chat away with their watches
item.description: Garmin taps WhatsApp, says the app will likely be the "first" and "only" of its kind for several select watches.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Training Readiness widget on the Garmin Fenix 8
media:content.media:text: Training Readiness widget on the Garmin Fenix 8
media:content.media:title: Training Readiness widget on the Garmin Fenix 8

item.title: Google Labs’ Stitch is a design canvas that turns your voice into an app
item.description: Google’s Stitch lets you build app UIs from simple prompts, speeding up design fast, but it could also lead to generic, same-looking apps if everyone relies on AI too much.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Labs at Google IO 2023
media:content.media:text: Labs at Google IO 2023
media:content.media:title: Labs at Google IO 2023

item.title: Getting 25W wireless charging on the Galaxy S26 Ultra is trickier than it should be
item.description: Many Galaxy S26 Ultra users are seeing lower wireless charging speeds than expected.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: Not a typo: Mint Mobile is now selling the Google Pixel 10 for only $299 — plus get 50% off a year of unlimited

item.title: Your medical history is coming to Fitbit whether you're ready or not
item.description: Fitbit’s finally getting smart by linking your actual medical records and fixing its lying sleep tracker.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: For the full scope, Fitbit's AI health coach can now read your medical records to help

item.title: Your next Galaxy phone could ditch Samsung’s own displays to save cash
item.description: Samsung may use cheaper third-party OLEDs for mid-range Galaxy phones to cut costs, but it’s unclear if those savings will actually reach buyers or just boost margins.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Google's Gemini for Home is finally useful enough to not drive you crazy
item.description: Google finally taught Gemini for Home to talk less and work up to 40% faster, delivering smarter alarms and slick automations without all the annoying chatter.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Nest Hub Max

item.title: OPPO's Find N6 foldable has a unique multitasking feature that Google needs to steal immediately
item.description: OPPO just launched the Find N6, and the foldable comes with a brand-new multitasking feature called Free-Flow Window that mimics desktop windows.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

item.title: The Galaxy S26 Ultra proves Samsung is evolving, and its direction makes a lot of sense in the AI age
item.description: Samsung may not be pushing the envelope for specs anymore, but that's not stopping the Galaxy S26 Ultra from being a great phone.

item.title: Less fatigue: Boox launches thin Go 10.3 (Gen 2) E-Ink tablet that's easy on the reading eyes

item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)

item.title: The Galaxy S26 Ultra may be dominating the airwaves, but its biggest competitor is $400 cheaper for a limited time

item.title: The more I use the Tecno Camon 50 Ultra, the more it feels like an affordable Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: Tenco's latest Camon 50 Ultra focuses on performance and AI, offering tons of features and a solid software experience for less than a typical flagship.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
